title: Fused batch statistics Triton kernel (mean/max/min)
summary: Single-pass batch-statistics helpers for mean, max, and min, including masked variants used in data metrics.
success_gate: Match the plain torch statistics helpers while reducing the number of kernel launches.

results.note: Single-pass mean/max/min with atomic_add/max/min. Supports masked variant. Reduces 3 kernel launches to 1 for compute_data_metrics.

notes: Normalized from the legacy task-card schema on 2026-04-03 to restore queue validation.
